name: Mei Chen

background.work_status: CNA at local nursing home, 20 hrs/week
background.family_background: From Presque Isle, ME. Parents run a small farm. Chose UMaine to stay near family.

perspective: Sees public speaking course as irrelevant to nursing. Does not realize how much of an NP role involves patient education, presenting at care conferences, and advocating to administrators. Would benefit from a health communication framing for speech assignments.
